- Note: Verified on apple silicon (native), the score is based on the input C file, not the output binary. SHA256 of that is  1b710bc9fee1f6b072be719eb0509497b25e18c9bf034ca4a8ad809ab68c867e

Output:
```
❯ echo '' | base64 -d > entry.c
❯ gcc -o entry entry.c
❯ ./entry
```
